headline: Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) Stock May Be Fairly Valued Despite Storm Recovery Work
summary: Public Service Enterprise Group stock is coming off a solid 56.1% total return over the last five years, yet the current checks point to a more balanced picture, with the Dividend Discount Model (DDM) suggesting the intrinsic value is broadly in line with the market price while earnings-based multiples screen as modestly supportive. Over five years, Public Service Enterprise Group has returned 56.1%, which puts recent short term share price softness into a longer term context. Heavy recent...
